description.value:
Send Medication data TA building blocks for patient C. XXX_Coenen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_medicatiegegevens_sturen_TA
Original description: TEST Medicatiegegevens TA Scenarioset 2
Send Medication data TA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1137891')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68632')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117145')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '598860')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '5967')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '16810')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1421778')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '141631')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '16918')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '425087')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '17205')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '41092')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '644781')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '80691')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '79804')))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1137891|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ACETYLSALICYLZUUR CARDIO AUROBINDO DISP TABL 80MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '644781|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (SOFRADEX OORDRUPPELS)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '425087|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (BROXIL CAPSULE 500MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '598860|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (FUROSEMIDE SANDOZ TABLET 40MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1421778|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (METHOTREXAAT PCH TABLET 2,5MG)
